summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Incubateur des Créateurs platform - successful refactor from UGC Machine with new private platform features, OTP authentication, progressive onboarding, and premium incubator system

minor_bugs.note: Likely due to session cookies persisting in test session - not a production issue

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay prevents clicking on pack cards
ui_bugs.selector: Pack selection cards in business dashboard
ui_bugs.note: Dialog overlay intercepts pointer events - needs force=True for clicks or better modal implementation

passed_tests: Login page loads with 'Incubateur des Créateurs' branding
OTP email login flow (request code, verify) works correctly
Google login button present and properly styled
'Demander un accès' dialog opens and functions
Type selection page after first login (Créateur/Entreprise)
Creator dashboard with completion progress bar (0% for new users)
Smart scoring system (completion, reliability, performance scores)
Creator profile editing in slide-out sheet opens correctly
Portfolio section with minimum 3 videos warning
Incubator Premium CTA with correct pricing (49€/mois)
Navigation links to Formations and Missions work
Business dashboard with pack selection flow
Pack selection dialog shows all 4 packs with correct pricing
Browse creators navigation works
Project creation flow (requires pack selection first)
Platform stats API returns correct data structure
Packs API returns all 4 packs with proper structure
Creators API with filtering works correctly
OTP authentication flow for both creator and business users
User type selection after authentication
Creator profile management with new scoring system
Business profile management and pack selection
Training system API endpoints
Project system API endpoints
Incubator premium info API
Access request functionality
Protected routes redirect to login (authentication working)
Logout functionality returns to login page
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay issue in pack selection dialog - use force=True for clicks or improve modal implementation to prevent pointer event interception
